description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test and lint that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow should have read permission to repository contents and consist of two jobs: tests and linting. The tests job should run on multiple Python versions (3.6-3.10) on an ubuntu-latest environment, checking out the code, setting up Python, loading pip cache, installing dependencies, and running tests. The linting job should run on ubuntu-latest, checking out the code, setting up Python 3.9, loading pip cache, installing dependencies, and running linter checks.
